entities.name: apply charges to Bpost business account
entities.mention: have the charges applied directly to a Bpost business account

relations.evidence: Set up the *Bpost* shipping connector in Odoo
Create a Bpost account.
Get the Account ID and passphrase
Get the Account ID and passphrase
Set up the shipping method in Odoo
calculate the cost of shipping

relations.target: apply charges to Bpost business account
relations.evidence: have the charges applied directly to a Bpost business account
automatically print Bpost tracking labels
seealso: - third_party_shipper
seealso: - ../setup_configuration
seealso: - dhl_credentials
seealso: - ups_credentials
Odoo's shipping method
needed to configure Odoo's shipping method
needed to configure Odoo's shipping method
navigating to the Shipping Manager menu item. On the Shipping Manager page, go to the Admin tab
then the General Settings tab
to find the Account ID
and Passphrase
create, or log into, the company's Bpost business account
When creating the Bpost account, have the company's VAT number
and mobile phone number ready
enter a contractual business relationship between the company and Bpost
Odoo cannot be integrated with non-business Bpost accounts
